Steps23
Final steps for Best UI
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
opsai_steps20_to_50_point_hackathon_final_all_in_one.sh

cd ~

chmod +x ~/opsai_steps20_to_50_point_hackathon_final_all_in_one.sh

bash ~/opsai_steps20_to_50_point_hackathon_final_all_in_one.sh








#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail
export AWS_PAGER=""

PROJECT_DIR="$HOME/opsai-assistant-aws"
ENV_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/.env"
TEMP_DIR=""

show_error() {
  local line_number="$1"
  local exit_code="$2"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo "ERROR: Final OpsAI hackathon installation stopped."
  echo "Line: $line_number"
  echo "Exit code: $exit_code"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo
  echo "Backups created by the embedded scripts were retained."
}

trap 'show_error "$LINENO" "$?"' ERR

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${TEMP_DIR:-}" && -d "$TEMP_DIR" ]]; then
    rm -rf "$TEMP_DIR"
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "============================================================"
echo " OpsAI Steps 20 to Hackathon Final - One-File Installation"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Run this one file after completing the manual Steps 1 through 19."
echo
echo "It installs:"
echo "  1. 30-VM GTO infrastructure dashboard"
echo "  2. Patching, vulnerability, reboot and health views"
echo "  3. Human approval workflow"
echo "  4. Complete HR Portal"
echo "  5. 10 managers, 20 jobs and 40 candidates"
echo "  6. All 17 hiring stages"
echo "  7. Final theme, images, home enhancements and globe"
echo "  8. Fixed HR quick buttons"
echo "  9. Value and ROI tab with interactive calculator"
echo " 10. Responsible AI, RBAC design and audit tab"
echo " 11. CGI reusability and industry-use-case tab"
echo " 12. Final Amplify deployment and validation"
echo

if [[ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Project directory was not found:"
  echo "  $PROJECT_DIR"
  exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Environment file was not found:"
  echo "  $ENV_FILE"
  exit 1
fi

for command_name in \
  aws \
  bash \
  base64 \
  curl \
  grep \
  node \
  python3 \
  sha256sum \
  unzip \
  zip
do
  if ! command -v "$command_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "ERROR: Required command is not available: $command_name"
    exit 1
  fi
done

aws sts get-caller-identity --output table

set -a
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}"
AWS_DEFAULT_REGION="${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-$AWS_REGION}"
export AWS_REGION AWS_DEFAULT_REGION

echo
echo "Project: $PROJECT_DIR"
echo "Region:  $AWS_REGION"
echo

TEMP_DIR="$(mktemp -d "$HOME/.opsai-hackathon-final.XXXXXX")"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR"

echo "Preparing embedded final scripts..."

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_HACKATHON_PAYLOAD_01_EOF'

OPSAI_HACKATHON_PAYLOAD_01_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="e5b475e2aaf7d81882f0ec6ce3bc0ef8d6a1d0c8a292719c57b70d27bd479202"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh"
echo "Validated: 01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh"

cat > "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh.b64" <<'OPSAI_HACKATHON_PAYLOAD_02_EOF'

OPSAI_HACKATHON_PAYLOAD_02_EOF

base64 --decode   "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh.b64"   > "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh"

rm -f "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh.b64"
chmod 700 "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh"

EXPECTED_SHA256="b537d812d22a45d0eff3d7900a41e782662122174dccef23f1e90a2ea404718d"
ACTUAL_SHA256="$(sha256sum "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh" | awk '{print $1}')"

if [[ "$ACTUAL_SHA256" != "$EXPECTED_SHA256" ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: Integrity validation failed for 02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh."
  exit 1
fi

bash -n "$TEMP_DIR/02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh"
echo "Validated: 02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh"

echo
echo "All embedded files passed syntax and integrity checks."

run_phase() {
  local number="$1"
  local title="$2"
  local script_name="$3"

  echo
  echo "============================================================"
  echo " Phase ${number} of 2"
  echo " ${title}"
  echo "============================================================"
  echo

  bash "$TEMP_DIR/$script_name"

  echo
  echo "Phase ${number} completed successfully."
}

run_phase \
  "1" \
  "Complete OpsAI UI, GTO dashboards and HR Portal" \
  "01_install_opsai_steps20_to_final.sh"

run_phase \
  "2" \
  "Hackathon value, governance and industry showcase" \
  "02_add_hackathon_50_point_showcase.sh"

cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
WEB_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/app/web"

node --check "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"
node --check "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "GTO – Global Technology Operations" \
  "$WEB_DIR/demo-ops.js"

grep -q "Candidate View" \
  "$WEB_DIR/hr-portal.js"

grep -q "CGI Reusability" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "Responsible AI" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "AI-to-ROI" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "MVP READINESS" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "ORIGINALITY" \
  "$WEB_DIR/opsai-hackathon-showcase.js"

grep -q "opsai-hackathon-showcase.css" \
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"

grep -q "opsai-hackathon-showcase.js" \
  "$WEB_DIR/index.html"

echo
echo "============================================================"
echo " OpsAI Hackathon Final installation completed successfully"
echo "============================================================"
echo
echo "Final tabs:"
echo "  New Chat"
echo "  Infrastructure Assets"
echo "  Approvals"
echo "  HR Portal"
echo "  Value & ROI"
echo "  Governance & Audit"
echo "  Industry Use Cases"
echo
echo "Open the Amplify application in Incognito or press Ctrl + Shift + R."
